titleStmt.title: SII 39.190: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 190. (A.R. No. 190 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARAGHAVAPERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME PRĀKĀRA. TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN VIJAYAGAṆḌAGOPĀLA DĒVA-6TH YEAR (1256 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of 32 cows for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Vijayarāghava Perumāḷ by Sambuvarāyar-Vīrachōḻaṉ. Signatory Kōyirkaṇakku Tiruppuṭ-kuḻipiriyaṉ is mentioned in the inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī vicaiyakaṇṭagopāla devaṟku yāṇṭu 10 6vatu ceyaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu
tāmaṟkoṭṭattu tāmarnāṭṭut tiruppati tiruppukkuḻi nāyaṉār vicaiya rākavap perumāḷukku nāyaṉār campu
varāyar viracoḻaṉ tirununtāviḷakkukku viṭṭa pacu 3 10 2 ṛṣapam 1- Āka Uru 3 10 3- m koṇṭu centirātitta
varai naṭattakkaṭavom tiruppuṭkuḻi nāyaṉār koyiṟ tāṉattārom paṇiyāl koyiṟkaṇakku tiruppuṭkuḻipiriyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.190 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
